results.rendered_html:
parivṛtta p. p.
1 Revolved, turned round; ˚ardhamukhī  V. 1. 17. 
2 Retreated, turned back.
3 Exchanged, bartered.
4 Finished, ended.
— ttaṃ An embrace.
